ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., MBBS, DM) */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch or specialization of the course */,
  "total_seat" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available for the course */,
  "course_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course in years */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee per year for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the faculty teaches */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Medicine, Surgery) */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of enrollment (e.g., active, graduated) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade obtained by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the fee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the fee is applicable */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the tuition fee for that year */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms and conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., textbook, video, article) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path or URL to the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the record */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student */,
  "semester" INTEGER /* Semester in which the grade was obtained */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA calculated for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., enrollment, grade, payment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the role of the user in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student making the payment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the scholarship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_type" TEXT /* Type of scholarship (e.g., merit-based, need-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarships_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholarships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
